analysis.summary_en: Risk-off day in Taipei with TAIEX -0.96% led by heavy selling in TSMC (-2.06%) and Foxconn (-2.44%) on what looks like a position-trim day rather than fundamental news. Notably, TSMC ADR was UP +0.45% overnight, creating a sharp 2.51% ADR-local divergence that suggests local selling is sentiment/flow-driven, not earnings-driven. UMC bucked the trend (+3.76%) on huge volume (332M shares) — likely rotation from leading-edge logic into mature-node names, possibly tied to the Musk/TeraFab story raising questions about long-term TSMC competitive moat. MediaTek (+1.36%) also strong, reinforcing the rotation narrative.
analysis.summary_zh: 台北股市今日呈現避險格局,加權指數下跌0.96%,主因台積電(-2.06%)及鴻海(-2.44%)遭到沉重賣壓,看似資金調節而非基本面利空。值得注意的是,台積電ADR昨夜上漲0.45%,與本地價差達2.51%,顯示本地賣壓屬於情緒與資金流向所致,並非業績問題。聯電逆勢大漲3.76%,成交量高達3.32億股,可能是資金由先進製程龍頭輪動至成熟製程,或與Musk的TeraFab新聞引發台積電長期護城河疑慮有關。聯發科(+1.36%)同樣走強,強化了類股輪動的訊號。

key_stories.headline_en: Musk's TeraFab project framed as disruption to semiconductor landscape before producing a chip
key_stories.headline_zh: 馬斯克TeraFab計畫被視為晶片尚未量產便已撼動半導體版圖
key_stories.analysis_en: DigiTimes piece on Tesla/Musk building an in-house fab plays into the long-term narrative that hyperscalers and Tesla want to reduce TSMC dependency. Reality check: TeraFab is years away from meaningful capacity and Tesla still relies on TSMC N4/N3 for AI5/AI6. The ADR was up 0.45% — US investors didn't flinch. Local 2.06% drop on TSMC looks more like profit-taking after a strong run plus headline-driven retail anxiety. UMC's surge on massive volume could be sympathy buying as 'mature-node beneficiary if leading-edge gets disrupted' — but this is a stretch thesis.
key_stories.analysis_zh: DigiTimes報導特斯拉/馬斯克自建晶圓廠,呼應雲端巨頭與特斯拉欲降低對台積電依賴的長期敘事。但實際上TeraFab距離實質產能仍有數年,特斯拉AI5/AI6晶片仍仰賴台積電N4/N3製程。ADR上漲0.45%顯示美國投資人並未在意,本地台積電大跌2.06%更像漲多獲利了結加上新聞引發的散戶情緒。聯電爆量上漲可能是「若先進製程受衝擊,成熟製程受惠」的同情買盤——但此論述偏牽強。

key_stories.headline_en: UMC volume explosion (332M shares, +3.76%) decoupled from ADR (-0.11%)
key_stories.headline_zh: 聯電爆量3.32億股大漲3.76%,與ADR(-0.11%)嚴重背離
key_stories.analysis_en: A -3.87% ADR-local divergence on UMC with extreme local volume is unusual. Either (a) local-only news/rumor we're not seeing (Intel foundry partnership? mature-node price hike?), (b) short squeeze, or (c) a large institutional rotation into mature-node names. Without a confirmed catalyst this is speculative momentum and tends to mean-revert when ADR re-opens. Watch UMC ADR tonight — if it doesn't catch up by 2-3%, today's local move is suspect.
key_stories.analysis_zh: 聯電ADR與本地價差達-3.87%且本地成交量極端放大,屬不尋常現象。可能原因:(a)本地獨家消息或傳聞(英特爾代工合作?成熟製程漲價?)、(b)軋空、(c)大型法人輪動至成熟製程。在催化劑未明朗前,此屬投機性動能,ADR重新開盤後易均值回歸。今晚緊盯聯電ADR——若未跟漲2-3%,則今日本地漲勢可疑。

key_stories.headline_en: Foxconn (2317) and ASE (3711) sold off despite firm ADRs
key_stories.headline_zh: 鴻海與日月光投控逆ADR走勢遭賣出
key_stories.analysis_en: Foxconn -2.44% and ASE -2.15% while their ADRs were positive overnight (ASX +0.54%). 71.8M shares on Foxconn is heavy. This pattern across multiple large caps — local weakness vs flat/positive ADRs — strongly suggests foreign institutional net selling pressure or a domestic flow event (margin call, fund redemption, FX-related). It's broad-based de-risking rather than name-specific.
key_stories.analysis_zh: 鴻海跌2.44%、日月光投控跌2.15%,但其ADR隔夜走勢正向(ASX +0.54%)。鴻海成交7,180萬股屬沉重。多檔大型權值股出現「本地弱、ADR平/強」的模式,強烈暗示外資調節賣壓或國內資金事件(融資追繳、基金贖回、匯率因素),屬全面性減碼而非個股利空。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: TSMC local underperformed ADR by 2.51%. If no fundamental news emerges, expect partial convergence — either local bounces tomorrow or TSM gives back tonight. Watch tonight's TSM open: if TSM opens flat/down to catch up, divergence resolves down; if TSM holds, 2330.TW likely bounces 1-2% tomorrow. Falsified if: TSMC issues guidance cut, foreign net sell data shows >NT$15B outflow, or a confirmed customer order pushout headline.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: 台積電本地表現落後ADR達2.51%。若無基本面利空,預期將部分收斂——明日本地反彈或今晚TSM回吐。觀察今晚TSM開盤:若TSM平/低盤向下收斂,則價差由下方解決;若TSM守穩,則2330.TW明日可能反彈1-2%。若出現以下情況則此判斷失效:台積電下修財測、外資賣超超過150億新台幣、或確認客戶訂單遞延新聞。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: Local UMC outperformed ADR by 3.87% on extreme volume. High suspicion of unsustainable local-only momentum. If UMC ADR doesn't gap up tonight to catch up, expect 2303.TW to give back 1.5-2.5% tomorrow. Falsified if: confirmed news of mature-node price hike, Intel foundry deal, or specialty foundry capacity tightness emerges within 24h.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: 聯電本地超漲ADR 3.87%,且爆量,高度懷疑為本地獨有的不可持續動能。若聯電ADR今晚未跳空跟漲,預期2303.TW明日回吐1.5-2.5%。若24小時內出現以下情況則判斷失效:確認成熟製程漲價、英特爾代工合作、或特殊製程產能吃緊新聞。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: Massive 7.39% divergence on Himax — ADR +4.77% while local -2.62%. This typically means strong overnight US news (earnings beat, AR/VR design win) that hasn't been priced in locally yet. 3504.TW likely opens with a gap up next session as local catches up to ADR. Highest-conviction arbitrage signal in today's data. Falsified if: the ADR move was a one-day squeeze with no news (check HIMX news flow), or local sellers know something specific (delisting risk, accounting issue) the US market hasn't absorbed.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: 奇景光電出現7.39%巨大價差——ADR大漲4.77%但本地反跌2.62%。通常代表美股有強勁隔夜消息(財報優於預期、AR/VR設計案斬獲)尚未反映於本地。3504.TW次一交易日大概率跳空向上補漲ADR走勢。為今日資料中最具信心的套利訊號。若出現以下情況則判斷失效:ADR僅為無新聞之單日軋空(需查證HIMX消息面)、或本地賣方掌握美股尚未消化的特定資訊(下市風險、會計問題)。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: ASE local lagged ADR by 2.69% — likely part of broader local de-risking flow rather than ASE-specific. Mild positive setup for local catch-up if foreign selling pressure abates.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: 日月光投控本地落後ADR 2.69%——多半屬全市場減碼,而非個股利空。若外資賣壓緩解,本地有溫和補漲空間。

analysis.no_signals_note: News flow is unusually thin (single DigiTimes article). Most of today's action looks flow/sentiment-driven rather than fundamental. The Himax ADR-local gap is the most actionable signal; UMC's volume spike warrants caution rather than chasing.
